text:
Grace Ma
Grace Ma joined Duke Kunshan University in October 2016. She is the Senior Director of Audit and Internal Compliance, responsible for helping DKU accomplish its objectives by bringing a systematic, disciplined and collaborative approach to monitor and improve risk and control environment. She is also responsible for providing oversight on significant institutional projects, enrollment, and compliance programs, to ensure the compliance across the university meets the effectiveness requirements of relevant laws and regulations.
Throughout her career, Grace has accumulated rich experience and practice in corporate finance, auditing, compliance and risk management in various industries and listed companies, such as KPMG, China Resources, Siemens, GCL and Rogers.
Grace earned her bachelor’s degree in financial management from Renmin University of China and her master’s from the Business School of the University of Manchester.
